holdings.infoBox: BETZ is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rush Street Interactive stock at 7.75%, Evolution AB at 7.17%, Lottomatica Group Spa at 6.59%, Super Group (SGHC) at 6.08%, and Lottery Corp Ltd/The at 5.74%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Sports Betting & iGaming ETF (BETZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks an index of global companies that are involved in the sports betting & iGaming industry, with tilted exposure to those with higher income derived from these themes. BETZ was launched on Jun 4, 2020 and is issued by Roundhill.
